review_title: Lovo makes machine voice so natural
description: I have been using TTS since 2016 for my animation and training purposes. I have used all major TTS service providers in the market. Most of the voices generated are quite similar and sound robotic, however, some TTS service providers have given the flexibility to fine-tune pauses, breaks and high/low tones.
author: Shaikh Hafizur R.
pros: The most beautiful thing I have found in LOVO is some amazing voice skins. It is so natural and polished.
cons: I will suggest one area of Improvement (not a problem) to bring a feature of adding pauses, breaks and intonations. Also, I am looking for dialogue or more than 2 person's conversation features ( in the same Text box), where I can select 1 voice for 1 sentence and another voice for another sentence because it will help me and other animators to create voice-over for different characters easily.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Voices are almost real!
description: I have tried 4 different tools - Play.ht, Happy Scribe, Listnr and Voicely. Most of them are good (except Voicely) but none of them sounds realistic and voices are amazing with emotion.
author: Kiran K.
pros: When I heard the converted text for the first time, I felt like it's almost real. Best part was you can control and emphasis the words which is awesome. Over all good tool to have if you are any agency!
cons: There is a slight robotic tone, unless someone is expert, other people were not able to recognize.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: They DELETE VOICES without warning, explanation or apology, beware!
description: I initially thought it was one of the better ones. But as it turns out it has been a total waste of money as I am going to have to redo everything I've used it for as I will no longer be able to edit it or add things using the same character voice. We use voices for specific characters in our case studies, but then Lovo delete the voices. That makes it a hugely expensive in time and money. I really wish I'd never heard of this product.
author: Sarah E.
pros: I don't like anything about it at all any more. Lovo have turned my view of them on its head, well done. It's a four letter word here.
cons: You can't trust this company and its software. They DELETE VOICES without warning, with no explanation and no apology or understanding of the customer perspective at all. AVOID, do not buy, do not risk it or you may waste a lot of time using a voice which disappears. The basic disregard of customers who have creative projects that they may need to continue with or to edit in the future shows a complete lack of understanding of their service. A company is/should be more than the technology it uses, don't be fooled. You can ONLY use this for one-off projects you will never need to change. No way could you charge customers for videos using these voices is there, think about it, what if they ask for edits and you can't do it.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: A TTS tool that offer unique voices with great quality
description: LOVO is very easy to use and I really like the outputs that are natural and not robotic like other tools.
author: Natapol S.
pros: - Easy to use UI/UX - Very unique selections of voices with great quality. Lots of them sound very realistic, not robotic. This is very important to me because I was looking at sever TTS tools but they were pretty much that same with the voices from the same combination of the TTS engines. But LOVO uses its own! - Speed of conversion is great. - Editing is super easy - Outputs are uncompressed WAV. We can get the media team to easily work on this for extra effects for the final products.
cons: - While UI/UX is very easy to use, but it feels a bit too plain and boring. Perhaps modernize it a bit if possible, but not really necessary - No support for Thai language yet. It would be great it they can do this also.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Create outstanding audio for your project quickly.
description: As a podcast creator for my website user, LOVO studio gives me chance to accelerate my work. Moreover, output from LOVO studio is not Robotic at all. BGM included in LOVO studio gives me the upper hand over other Competitors of mine. I needed a platform to create quickly audio for my website, with LOVO i can easily complete my goal. I recently purchased a deal from APPSUMO, which gives me straight hand to work with my content audio files.
author: Khan Md Mohaiuminul Islam S.
pros: For my website, I was searching for Text to speech software. Lovo is the far best Text to speech software, I used. It has a good interface, easy control and navigate. I got appsumo deal, I have to say, at this price with this quality, I would never get a better deal. It provides me chance to create Multi-language audio files with Natural Voices. Good competitor of AMAZON Polly or GOOGLE Wavenet, Comes at a cheaper price. To produce quick audio for Podcast, video, website content LOVO studio is best with natural like voice output.
cons: I like to see more language integration in future, if possible need to add more emotion in the audio voice would be very good.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I am pleased with the outcome
author: Tony C.
pros: When you’re looking for a voice for your next project, it can be downright tedious to search through countless. You might just think it’s easier to record yourself, but that doesn’t make your video content feel unique. LOVO offers 180+ voices to choose from and a wide range of customization options. I like that we can add background music to the voices. This is what makes LOVO such a great way to create compelling content. I highly recommend it if you need a TTS.
cons: I don't dislike anything so far, but if they can add more voices and do voice cloning at a cheaper rate, that would be incredible.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic Text to Speech Platform
description: Finding the perfect voice for your text-based content can be a challenge. But LOVO can help you get the right voice for text-based content in multiple languages. Most text-based content relies on text to convey the messages and information such as blog posts, articles, transcripted podcasts, and product descriptions. Here are some reasons why you may need LOVO. You’re launching a video into another country where their dialect will require different pronunciation from yours; Your project requires subtitles so your target audience can understand what they’re reading; The people who originally created the text for your article speak the language that you may need. With over 180+ voices to suit your needs, LOVO packs a strong punch. If you need text-to-speech without translating accents, then using generic synthetic speech tools is possible as well but with a specialized tool like LOVO, it is no contest. It has also made sharing audio easy by making social media posts about it from within LOVO (available only on desktop at this point). With unlimited conversions, and being able to add background music makes this a fantastic deal. I strongly recommend this platform for all your text-to-speech needs.
author: Tae Y.
pros: I like the selection of voices and given the ability pick the one that is suitable for your project.
cons: I wish there were more language options, but more are coming, in the future.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Fantastic AI TTS Program
description: Fantastic experience! I couldn't be happier with the tool and interface.
author: Matthew Z.
pros: I have tried a lot of differen TTS programs and most fall short. Most rely on Google's Wave Net, Amazon's TTS API, or IBM Watson's TTS. Lovo is different because the team created their own algorithms to basically clone someone's voice so the voices sound incredibly realistic. I love that part because I cringe every time I hear a robotic TTS. But many of the voice skins in Lovo sound great! I am also looking into cloning my own voice to use it for automating the conversion of my online content to voice. It would be a huge time saver!
cons: Some of the voice skins are hit or miss. It's hard to tell which are good and which are robotic. If I had to say, I think about 50% are top-notch and fall into the 7-8 range for passing for a human while the rest are probably around 5-6.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Oh wow
author: Yvens U.
pros: I wasn't expecting the voices to be as realistic are some of them are! Picking certain english voices with accents makes it even more realistic. I don't think i've ever been this happy with synthetic voices, aside from a service i was paying $99 a month for. Definitely canceling my subscription to that service.
cons: some voices are still robotic. i think they should review those specific ones, until they get them to sound natural like that others.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Stunning voices and sweet UI/UX
author: Pranesh P.
pros: The best thing about LOVO is the elegant UX and simplicity. Its a breeze to convert your text input to human like speech with granular control.
cons: The choice of voices for each language is little limited. More voice samples can be added .
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Unique voicee models make this a unique TTS tool
description: Quick voiceovers for in house use or YouTube videos. Hoping to eventually create audio books of my fiction, nonfiction, and poetry with them.
author: Jackson C.
pros: I love the quality of the tool. It offer some of the best outputs plus customization options!
cons: Needs more unique voices in a variety of styles for a variety of use cases. Would like to see more dramatic voice actor options for dramatizing fiction into audio books.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Easy and Intuitive TTS Software
author: Alex M.
pros: LOVO Studio is incredibly easy to use. Log in, choose your voice you would like, enter your text, convert, and play your audio file. It's that simple. You can increase/decrease the speed of the voice, emphasize certain words and even train the voice to pronounce words properly.
cons: When I first started with LOVO Studio, they were a brand new product and there were some occasional errors. However, I have seen this company grow and their product has matured.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Lovo, Loving it!
author: Hue T.
pros: LOVO will let you find a human voice that sounds like an average person of each country speaking English. With LOVO, you will be able to insert a pause between phrases or sections in your speech and make it sound less robotic or monotone by adding some accents and emphases. Text-to-speech engine – LOVO reads every word, no matter where in the text it is. It makes it easy to create professional-looking video content. Access a wide range of human-like voices that are realistic. Add emphasis for emphasis and stress words like in a lecture. Control the speed of the recorded voice. Insert breaks as needed. LOVO is a software that allows you to create professional-looking voiceover content with the right technology for any audience with the right technology.
cons: I wish it included the API, so I can automate this with my chatbot. But it doesn't come with it. It's a separate product.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A great buy for my business (useful and powerful)
description: So far, I've been able to get exactly what I wanted from the software.
author: Juan M.
pros: I love the different voices that you're able to select and I see that they keep adding more and more voices. I especially liked the few celebrity voices that they have in their system (even though it's not the actual celebrities, they work) I've already created a video sales letter with it and I had to tweak it a bit to get it sounding the way I like it, but it's totally worth it. I've created a few ads already and the voiceover work is spot on.
cons: One thing I don't like about it is the 15k character limit on the clips but I'm sure they'll figure out a better way to handle that. Some of the voices do sound robotic, so it's really a thing of selecting the right voice to work for your business.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The one to have, completely LOVO it!!!
description: I basically bought it as soon as I saw their deal, the limits are great, the voices sound amazing, I already have other text-to-speech tools, but the limits and quality on LOVO's are just incomparable.
author: Mario M.
pros: Easy to use, you get so many totally different text to speech voices in one package, plus the unlimited offer is just too good to not get a max stack.
cons: None at the moment, I could maybe say that I would like more voices, but they already have a lot.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Nice UI
description: To be honest, I have to test it more in depth. Would like to see more voices in Spanish - there are only 5 for now, and unfortunately they all sound robotic (English voices are good though). I think it has potential.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Nice UI and easy to use. Also there are a lot of languages (up to 180)!
cons: Only 5 voices for Spanish language, and they all sound quite robotic.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: I already have other TTS tools but this one is special!
description: I really like the high quality and the responsive support
author: Rasmus K.
pros: I really love how realistic the voices are compared to similar TTS tools
cons: While their terms are absolutely fair, I can always hope for improved options, terms and price for cloning/training your own customized voice
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great TTS addition for podcast or audio books
author: Lee L.
pros: Good quality TTS voices Simple UI improve voice emphasis output with pauses and speed rate pronunciation editor Background music can be added to voices
cons: The 15,000 character per download seems a bit limiting
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Realistic Voice
description: I use a lot this tool. Eccellent for podcast.
author: Giulio D.
pros: I really like the realistic voice editor that's Is natural. I really like also the interface.
cons: Nothing in particular. I just gope that the team keep imoproving the tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great creative potential with project versatility
description: Overall, I had a good experience with the app. There are multiple languages, multiple accents and the platform's interface is very intuitive and easy to use. For example, for me, it has been as easy as typing a text and select the language and accent I wanted and generate the speech.
author: Mayerlin R.
pros: I used the free trial and I liked the fact that I could choose among multiple languages and accents. For example, I am a native Spanish speaker, in this case from Colombia. I wanted to generate a demo speech in Colombian Spanish and I found that option. I liked the result a lot. The voice sounded so natural as if it was produced by a real human female.
cons: I did not like the fact that I could not download the speech generated. I mean, the allowed content with the free trial is limited, as there are only 5 minutes/month available. At least, I would have expected that this generated content could be downloaded.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: What a Scam!
description: Not honest and transparent up front. Super deceiving. I don't trust the brand at all! I will warn as many people as I can
author: Jessy I.
pros: None.
cons: They market as "free" but it's not. You can't download unless you pay, which is fine. But they also don't tell you certain features are not available to all plans but the most expensive one, such as water mark in your video, or voices. Basically unless you pay $350USD a year, you get nothing. But of course, you don't find out until AFTER you've purchased the plan. Super deceiving. Buyers be aware! So if you compare their most expensive plan with other text- voice tools, they are much much more expensive.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great voices with great team behind it
description: I enjoyed using Lovo as it has a fantastic user interface and was able to onboard myself in a matter of a minute. These voices just rock and go beyond anything you previously generated with others from the shelf generators! It's next-level audio using some cutting edge A.I. generators. The pronunciation and emotional emphasis of artificial voices is evolving at a pretty quick rate, but the LOVO voices are currently one of the players at the forefront of this development.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Some of the TTS unique functionality in the offer include a classification of voices by age groups (like a child), Characters of voice (cartoon, angry, etc.). The pronunciation editor can help us fine-tune some special wordings, like proper nouns like a brand name.
cons: Allow using timestamp/delay between different sentences/paragraphs via text file upload
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Amazing Natural Voices that sound so credible!
description: Honestly this service amazed me with the quality of the premium narrators. I feel I got my own professional voice actors, at my beck and call. I have tons of use for this service, now that I know this kind of natural voice quality exists. What is so good is the character range, my mini production outfit now can cover the gamut of serious news readers to epic Spielbergian adventures!
author: Tony C.
pros: I love Lovo as its one of the best in its class at parsing a natural sounding voice from text, that doesn't sound robotic. The service allows you to get great tonal range and diversity from the collection of voices provided.
cons: Although the technical functionality is very impressive, the UI needs more refinement in terms of appearance and flow. It would just just help me love the platform if it this got more attention . Also if possible more tweaking of the intonation of the sentences and the Web site embedding functionality. It would be very exciting to see multiple reader feature on same body of text perhaps. These concerns are probably on the todo list of the service, I'm sure, as improvements rollout.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Lovo is my new love for TTS
description: All in all, Lovo is a good choice for TTS generation, especially for voice-over of video clips, e-learning lectures, news update etc. I would recommend to try certain excellent voices - you will see the magic.
author: Hoang P.
pros: Lovo is clearly not the only option in the field of TTS. But Lovo has various unique features that I like: - The ability to generate voice-over for videos, such as e-learning, is great. It is quite easy and handy to do. - The customization of voices is great - Not all the voices, but quality of some voices are incredible - equal to top premium voices, especially in English. The fact that these are "hand-made" by Lovo is a big plus
cons: The app should incorporate the ability to generate Podcast, or audio player that can generate audio directly from a site (such as a Wordpress plugin) and be embeded in the page The quality of some voice variants (such as German, Vietnam etc.) should be better. Various voices in those non-English languages sound robotic.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Excellent tool for voiceovers
description: Overall the experience is very good when you need to create videos, ads, campaigns. Easy interface to use and LOVO breaks the entire text into small manageable sentences, thus making it easy to manage your work. The collaboration workflow allows you to review and finalize your content without eating into your allotted credits.
author: Ankush C.
pros: It is an easy-to-use tool with some excellent voices. The tool allows to put emphasis, manage speed and pauses for a more natural effect. One of the biggest pluses of LOVO is that they have their own voices in addition to some of the common voices offered by all other tools
cons: The emphasis option is currently limited to few voices only. I would really like it to be available for all
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
